pickup.name: Magnetic Lodestone
pickup.effect: Attracts metallic minerals to enhance geomancy

encounters.trigger: Defeating the eel vibrates the seafloor to open the Trench Path.

pickup.name: Ancient Core Fragment
pickup.effect: Provides geo-thermal energy burst

encounters.trigger: Clearing the mech-crab allows the player to enter the Spire Sanctum.

pickup.name: Obsidian Keystone
pickup.effect: Unlocks the central chamber door

encounters.trigger: The Siren's defeat dissipates the protective barrier around the inner throne.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Depths
boss.victory_condition: Use the Keystone to overload the boss's internal pressure valves.

output.objective: Retrieve the heart of the Spire to restore balance to the oceanic currents.
output.reward: The Earth-Shaker Trident and mastery of pressure manipulation.

pickup.name: Bioluminescent Spore
pickup.effect: Temporarily blinds light-sensitive creatures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the school clears the path to the Sunken Archway.

pickup.name: Deep-Sea Conch
pickup.effect: Produces a resonant frequency that shatters hardened shells

encounters.trigger: Opening the shell triggers the seal on the Abyssal Grotto entrance.

pickup.name: Ancient Pearl of Calm
pickup.effect: Nullifies aggressive behavior in deep-sea titans

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the pearl awakens the Reef Guardian boss.

boss.name: Reef Guardian Leviathan
boss.victory_condition: Calm the creature using the Ancient Pearl to restore peace to the reef.

output.objective: Restore harmony to the Crystal Reefs by calming the Leviathan.
output.reward: The title of Reef Protector and a permanent speed boost.

pickup.name: High-Voltage Battery
pickup.effect: Doubles current weapon shock damage

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock releases the internal pressure, causing the facility's power core to fluctuate, activating the security drone.

pickup.name: Super-Conductor Coil
pickup.effect: Enables chain-lightning strikes

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers an emergency containment override, unlocking the ventilation shaft to the reactor room.

pickup.name: Reactor Bypass Key
pickup.effect: Overrides the boss room shield

encounters.trigger: The eel's death sparks a massive surge that fries the electronic locks on the reactor blast doors.

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the Reactor Bypass Key to vent the cooling gas, exposing the Leviathan's heart to a fatal lightning strike.

output.objective: Overload the Abyssal Trench reactor to purge the facility of mutated threats.
output.reward: The Stormcaller's Aegis: A legendary suit of armor that regenerates health when submerged.

output.setting: Sunken industrial reactor complex filled with escaping steam and unstable currents

pickup.name: Compressed Oxygen Canister
pickup.effect: Increases combustion potency for heat-based attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab forces the airlock to fully cycle, opening the flooded coolant tunnel.

pickup.name: Refined Magnesium Rod
pickup.effect: Allows for an intense chemical flash when ignited

encounters.trigger: Clearing the eels destroys the sediment barriers blocking the reactor core gate.

pickup.name: Reactor Overload Catalyst
pickup.effect: Unstable core material capable of massive thermal energy release

encounters.trigger: Disabling the guardian allows access to the central reactor console, summoning the final boss.

boss.name: Abyssal Reactor Core
boss.victory_condition: Successfully stabilize the core by using the catalyst to overload its external shielding.

output.objective: Navigate the collapsing facility, stabilize the reactor, and prevent a total meltdown.
output.reward: The Title of Deep-Sea Incinerator and unique thermic equipment upgrades.
